message:
audit: fresh-eyes batch 474 — mpsc.rs and h2/connection.rs SOUND

mpsc.rs (1944L): two-phase reserve/send, waker dedup, WeakSender CAS all correct.
h2/connection.rs (3402L): 1 LOW (rst_stream_count u32 wrap). Stream mux, flow control, CONTINUATION assembly correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
